homepage.heroSubline: Rocky Mountain Excavating delivers reliable and precise excavation services throughout Albuquerque. We handle projects of all sizes, from residential to commercial.
aboutText: Rocky Mountain Excavating started with a single backhoe and a vision: to provide Albuquerque with excavation services built on integrity and skill. Founded by native New Mexican, Jake Herrera, we understood the unique challenges of working in the high desert.

We approach every project with meticulous planning and execution. Our team uses modern equipment and time-tested techniques to ensure efficiency and safety. We value clear communication and collaboration, working closely with our clients every step of the way.

We're committed to Albuquerque. We actively support local charities and strive to minimize our environmental impact. We understand Albuquerque's unique landscape and are dedicated to preserving its beauty while building its future.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Albuquerque's soil conditions and permitting processes.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: We arrive on time and complete projects within budget and schedule.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: Comprehensive safety protocols to protect our team and your property.

valueProps.title: Modern Equipment
valueProps.description: Well-maintained fleet for efficient and precise excavation.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Rocky Mountain Excavating for a free estimate on your next project.

services.name: Site Preparation
services.shortDescription: Prepare your land for construction with our comprehensive site preparation services.
services.description: Proper site preparation is the foundation of any successful construction project. At Rocky Mountain Excavating, we offer a full range of site preparation services, including clearing vegetation, removing debris, grading and leveling, and soil stabilization. We understand the challenges of Albuquerque's diverse terrain, from the sandy soils of the North Valley to the rocky landscapes of the foothills. Our experienced team uses advanced equipment to ensure your site is ready for building, whether it's a residential home or a commercial development. We handle all aspects of site preparation, including erosion control, drainage solutions, and utility trenching. We also work closely with engineers and architects to ensure compliance with all local regulations and building codes. We are committed to providing efficient and reliable site preparation services that meet your specific needs and budget, setting the stage for a successful construction project.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the site's topography, soil conditions, and existing vegetation.
Step 2: Clearing and Grubbing - We remove trees, shrubs, and other vegetation to prepare the site for grading.
Step 3: Grading and Leveling - We reshape the land to create a level and stable surface for construction.
Step 4: Compaction - We compact the soil to ensure a solid foundation for building.
benefits: Ensures a stable foundation for construction
Prevents soil erosion and water damage
Meets all local regulations and building codes
Saves time and money on future repairs

faq.question: Why is site preparation important?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation ensures a stable foundation for your building, preventing costly problems down the road. It also helps with drainage and erosion control.

faq.question: How long does site preparation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do I need permits for site preparation?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, permits are required. We can assist you with the permitting process to ensure compliance with local regulations.

services.name: Foundation Excavation
services.shortDescription: Precise and reliable foundation excavation for residential and commercial buildings.
services.description: A solid foundation is paramount for any structure in Albuquerque. Rocky Mountain Excavating specializes in foundation excavation, ensuring accurate dimensions and proper depth for your building's foundation. We understand the unique soil conditions in Albuquerque, from the expansive clays in some areas to the caliche rock closer to the mountains. Our experienced operators use GPS-guided equipment to deliver precise excavation, minimizing the risk of errors and delays. We handle all types of foundation excavation, including basements, slabs-on-grade, and crawl spaces. We also provide backfilling and compaction services to ensure the foundation is properly supported. We prioritize safety and efficiency, working closely with builders and engineers to ensure the foundation meets all structural requirements. With Rocky Mountain Excavating, you can trust that your foundation will be built on a solid base, ready to withstand the test of time and the challenges of Albuquerque's climate.
process: Step 1: Layout - We mark the foundation outline according to the building plans.
Step 2: Excavation - We carefully excavate the soil to the specified depth and dimensions.
Step 3: Inspection - We ensure the excavation meets all structural requirements before pouring concrete.
Step 4: Backfilling - We backfill the excavated area and compact the soil to provide support for the foundation.
benefits: Ensures a stable and level foundation
Prevents foundation cracks and settlement
Meets all structural requirements
Reduces the risk of future repairs

faq.question: How deep should my foundation be?
faq.answer: The depth of the foundation depends on several factors, including soil conditions, frost line, and building codes. We will determine the appropriate depth during the site assessment.

faq.question: What type of equipment do you use for foundation excavation?
faq.answer: We use a variety of equipment, including excavators, backhoes, and bulldozers, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

faq.question: Do you handle basement excavation?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience in basement excavation, ensuring proper drainage and waterproofing.

services.name: Utility Trenching
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient utility trenching for water, sewer, gas, and electrical lines.
services.description: Rocky Mountain Excavating provides safe and efficient utility trenching services for residential and commercial properties in Albuquerque. We understand the importance of precise and careful excavation when installing or repairing underground utilities. We have extensive experience working with various utility companies and adhering to their specific requirements. Our team uses specialized equipment to minimize disruption to your property and ensure the trenches are dug to the correct depth and width. We handle trenching for water lines, sewer lines, gas lines, and electrical conduits. We also provide backfilling and compaction services to restore the area to its original condition. We prioritize safety and compliance, following all OSHA regulations and local codes to protect our team and your property. Whether you're installing new utilities or repairing existing ones, you can rely on Rocky Mountain Excavating for dependable and professional trenching services.
process: Step 1: Utility Locating - We locate and mark all existing underground utilities to prevent damage.
Step 2: Trenching - We carefully excavate the trenches to the specified depth and width.
Step 3: Pipe Installation - We install the utility lines according to the utility company's specifications.
Step 4: Backfilling - We backfill the trenches and compact the soil to restore the area.
benefits: Ensures safe and reliable utility connections
Prevents damage to existing underground utilities
Meets all utility company requirements
Restores the area to its original condition

faq.question: How do you prevent damage to existing utilities?
faq.answer: We use a combination of utility locating services, hand digging, and careful excavation techniques to minimize the risk of damage.

faq.question: What is the typical depth for utility trenches?
faq.answer: The depth varies depending on the type of utility and local codes. We will determine the appropriate depth during the planning phase.

faq.question: Do you handle emergency utility repairs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency utility repair services to address urgent situations promptly and efficiently.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.shortDescription: Efficient and environmentally responsible land clearing services for construction and development.
services.description: Whether you are preparing land for a new home, commercial building, or agricultural project, Rocky Mountain Excavating offers comprehensive land clearing services in Albuquerque. We understand the importance of responsible land clearing practices that protect the environment and preserve the natural beauty of New Mexico. Our team uses specialized equipment to remove trees, brush, and other vegetation while minimizing soil disturbance. We also offer selective clearing services to preserve desirable trees and shrubs. We handle all aspects of land clearing, including debris removal, stump grinding, and erosion control. We are committed to sustainable practices, recycling materials whenever possible and minimizing our impact on the environment. Rocky Mountain Excavating provides efficient and reliable land clearing services that prepare your land for development while protecting the environment for future generations. Albuquerque's varying landscape requires knowledge and care, and we pride ourselves on being stewards of the land.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the vegetation, topography, and environmental considerations.
Step 2: Clearing - We remove trees, brush, and other vegetation using appropriate equipment.
Step 3: Debris Removal - We remove and dispose of all debris in an environmentally responsible manner.
Step 4: Erosion Control - We implement erosion control measures to protect the soil and water quality.
benefits: Prepares land for construction and development
Protects the environment and preserves natural resources
Reduces the risk of wildfires
Improves property value

faq.question: How do you handle environmental concerns during land clearing?
faq.answer: We follow all environmental regulations and implement best management practices to minimize our impact on the environment. We also work with environmental consultants to ensure compliance.

faq.question: What happens to the trees and brush you remove?
faq.answer: We recycle materials whenever possible, such as chipping trees for mulch or donating them to local organizations. We dispose of non-recyclable materials in an environmentally responsible manner.

faq.question: Do I need permits for land clearing?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, permits are required. We can assist you with the permitting process to ensure compliance with local regulations.

services.name: Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Effective drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage and erosion.
services.description: Albuquerque's monsoon season can bring heavy rainfall and flash floods, making proper drainage essential for protecting your property. Rocky Mountain Excavating specializes in designing and installing effective drainage solutions for residential and commercial properties. We understand the unique challenges of Albuquerque's arid climate and the importance of managing stormwater runoff. Our team offers a variety of drainage solutions, including French drains, swales, culverts, and retention ponds. We carefully assess your property's topography, soil conditions, and drainage patterns to design a system that effectively manages water runoff and prevents water damage. We also provide maintenance and repair services for existing drainage systems. We prioritize quality and durability, using high-quality materials and proven construction techniques to ensure your drainage system provides long-lasting protection. With Rocky Mountain Excavating, you can rest assured that your property is protected from the damaging effects of water.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the property's topography, soil conditions, and drainage patterns.
Step 2: Design - We design a drainage system that effectively manages stormwater runoff.
Step 3: Installation - We install the drainage system using high-quality materials and proven techniques.
Step 4: Testing - We test the drainage system to ensure it is functioning properly.
benefits: Protects property from water damage and erosion
Prevents flooding and standing water
Improves property value
Reduces the risk of foundation problems

faq.question: What is a French drain?
faq.answer: A French drain is a trench filled with gravel or rock that contains a perforated pipe to redirect surface water and groundwater away from a specific area.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a drainage system?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need a drainage system include standing water, soggy soil, foundation cracks, and water damage in your basement.

faq.question: How much does a drainage system cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a drainage system varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We provide a free estimate after assessing your property.

services.name: Demolition Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient demolition services for residential and commercial structures.
services.description: Rocky Mountain Excavating provides safe and efficient demolition services for residential and commercial structures in Albuquerque. We understand the importance of careful planning and execution when demolishing a building or structure. Our team has the experience and equipment to handle demolition projects of all sizes, from small residential buildings to large commercial structures. We prioritize safety and compliance, following all OSHA regulations and local codes to protect our team and the surrounding environment. We handle all aspects of demolition, including site preparation, asbestos abatement (if necessary), structural demolition, and debris removal. We are committed to environmentally responsible practices, recycling materials whenever possible and minimizing our impact on the environment. Rocky Mountain Excavating provides reliable and professional demolition services that prepare your site for new construction.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate the structure, identify potential hazards, and develop a demolition plan.
Step 2: Permitting - We obtain all necessary permits and approvals from local authorities.
Step 3: Demolition - We carefully demolish the structure using appropriate equipment and techniques.
Step 4: Debris Removal - We remove and dispose of all debris in an environmentally responsible manner.
benefits: Prepares sites for new construction
Removes hazardous structures
Recycles materials whenever possible
Complies with all safety regulations

faq.question: Do I need a permit for demolition?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required for most demolition projects. We can assist you with the permitting process.

faq.question: What happens to the debris after demolition?
faq.answer: We recycle materials whenever possible, such as concrete and metal. We dispose of non-recyclable materials in an environmentally responsible manner.

faq.question: How long does demolition take?
faq.answer: The duration of demolition depends on the size and complexity of the project. We will provide a timeline during the planning phase.

serviceAreas.content:
Rocky Mountain Excavating is proud to offer comprehensive excavation services to Albuquerque and the surrounding areas. We understand the unique challenges of working in the high desert environment, from caliche soil to unpredictable weather. Our experienced team is equipped to handle any excavation project, large or small, with precision and efficiency.

We are committed to providing Albuquerque residents and businesses with reliable and affordable excavation solutions. Whether you need site preparation for a new construction project, utility trenching, or land clearing, we have the expertise and equipment to get the job done right. We prioritize safety and environmental responsibility in all our operations.
serviceAreas.localContext: Albuquerque is the largest city in New Mexico, known for its rich history, vibrant culture, and stunning landscapes. We are experienced in navigating the city's specific regulations and permitting processes to ensure a smooth and hassle-free experience for our clients.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Rocky Mountain Excavating did an outstanding job with our foundation excavation. They were on time, professional, and very careful to avoid damaging our existing landscaping. The team clearly communicated the entire process, and the final result was perfect. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We hired Rocky Mountain Excavating for utility trenching for a new gas line. They were quick and efficient. There was a small hiccup with the initial trench depth, but they corrected it immediately and without any complaints. Good service overall.

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: Jake and his crew cleared a large plot of land for us in the North Valley. They were very professional, and the job was completed on time and within budget. They even took care of all the permitting. Great experience!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: After experiencing significant flooding during the monsoon season, we contacted Rocky Mountain Excavating. They designed and installed a fantastic drainage system that has completely solved our water problems. Extremely happy with their work!

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: Rocky Mountain Excavating prepared our site for a new home build. The grading was well done, and they were very responsive to our questions throughout the process. Minor delay due to weather, but they kept us informed.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: We hired Rocky Mountain Excavating to demolish an old shed on our property. They were prompt, efficient, and left the site clean. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent. Would definitely use them again.
